summary: Alertas System Testing Complete: All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Dashboard Alertas Widget and Maquinaria ITV/Maintenance fields verified working. Evaluaciones and Maquinaria pages regression passed.

issues: React hydration warnings about span inside option/select/tr/td - these are from development tooling (x-file-name attributes) and do not affect production

seed_data_creation: Test maquinaria created and deleted during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Alertas system fully verified. Dashboard widget shows 2 alerts (1 ITV vencida, 1 mantenimiento pendiente) for Tractor John Deere 6120M. Maquinaria form has ITV/maintenance fields working. All data-testids present and functional.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/alertas/resumen: PASSED - Returns alert summary with tecnicos and maquinaria sections
backend_endpoints.alertas_detects_itv_vencida: PASSED - Detects ITV vencida for maquinaria with past fecha_proxima_itv
backend_endpoints.alertas_detects_mantenimiento_pendiente: PASSED - Detects mantenimiento pendiente when last maintenance + interval < today
backend_endpoints.POST /api/maquinaria (with ITV fields): PASSED - Creates maquinaria with fecha_proxima_itv, fecha_ultimo_mantenimiento, intervalo_mantenimiento_dias
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/maquinaria/{id} (with ITV field: PASSED - Updates maquinaria with ITV/maintenance fields

dashboard_alertas_widget.status: PASSED - Widget visible at bottom of dashboard
dashboard_alertas_widget.itv_section: PASSED - ITV Maquinaria section with '1 vencido' badge (data-testid=alertas-section-itv)
dashboard_alertas_widget.mantenimiento_section: PASSED - Mantenimiento Maquinaria section with '1 vencido' badge (data-testid=alertas-section-mantenimiento)
dashboard_alertas_widget.expandable_sections: PASSED - Sections expand to show details (Tractor John Deere 6120M - 11 dias de retraso)

maquinaria_page.kpis: PASSED - Shows Total (12), Activa (0), En Mantenimiento (0), ITV Vencida (1)
maquinaria_page.filters: PASSED - Tipo and Estado filters present

evaluaciones_page.filters: PASSED - 6 filters present (Parcelas, Cultivos, Proveedores, Campaña, Contratos, Estado)

playwright_tests.dashboard_alertas_widget: PASSED - Widget found, badge shows 2, ITV and Mantenimiento sections expandable
playwright_tests.maquinaria_form_itv_fields: PASSED - All 3 ITV/maintenance fields present and fillable
playwright_tests.evaluaciones_page_regression: PASSED - Page loads with filters and buttons
